card.base: bg-white border border-[#E7E5E4] rounded-lg p-6 shadow-sm
card.notes: Use for all dashboard widgets. No heavy drop shadows. Keep it flat, structured, and functional.

button.primary: bg-[#2F5233] text-white hover:bg-[#243E26] rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
button.secondary: bg-white text-[#2F5233] border border-[#2F5233] hover:bg-[#FDFBF7] rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors

header.base: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E7E5E4] sticky top-0 z-50
header.notes: Use glassmorphism for header if content scrolls under, otherwise use solid bg-white.

image_urls.description: Indian farmer holding tools. Use as the avatar or profile picture in the User Management and Header sections.
Aerial view of a green grass field. Use in the Crop Health Monitoring panel or as a side panel image for the Auth (Login/Signup) page.

icons.usage: Use Lucide React for all dashboard icons (e.g., Leaf, CloudRain, Activity, TrendingUp, AlertTriangle, User).

charts.notes: Use for Yield Prediction View and Farm Analytics Charts. Tooltips must be styled to match card surfaces.

animations.page_load: Framer Motion `staggerChildren` on dashboard cards with a gentle y-axis slide in (e.g., y: 20 -> 0) and fade in.
animations.interactions: Hover scaling on buttons and slight upward lift (-translate-y-1) on interactive cards.

testing.rules: All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., data-testid='yield-chart', data-testid='login-submit').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a Control Room style dashboard with a sidebar navigation.
Implement an Auth page (Login/Signup) utilizing a split layout where one side uses the `crop_imagery` as a background cover and the other side contains the auth form.
The dashboard layout MUST follow a mobile-first responsive design, stacking grid items on mobile.
Do NOT use pure #000000 or #808080. Follow the provided color palette exactly.
Implement the 'Market Prices Table' using the Shadcn Table component.
Use Lucide React icons for the 'Weather Forecast Widget' and other navigational elements.
Integrate Recharts for the 'Yield Prediction' and 'Soil Health' dashboards.
All components must use standard HTML layout elements (div, section) styled with Tailwind inside Shadcn UI wrappers.
